ensemble.feat_clf: sklearn LogisticRegression on 10 acoustic features, retrained at audit time
ensemble.subtype_cluster: k=4 KMeans on F0/HNR/band features, fit on yam_cry_score>=0.5

training_recommendation: Use captures with confidence_tier in {high_pos, high_neg} for model training (oracles agree). medium_* and low captures stay in the dataset for evaluation, uncertainty study, and oracle-disagreement investigation. human_note fields are SUPPLEMENTARY monitoring data — never override the ensemble verdict.
